title: Gaggle
description: A siloed workforce within an instance (GAG-001..007).

ciCommand.description: Per-gaggle local CI-equivalent command run by the deterministic local-ci stage instead of its declared default (MGV-1/#1009).

requiredCapabilities.description: Runner (toolchain/platform) capabilities every run of this gaggle needs, matched at schedule time against a runner's advertised set (RRQ-1/#1101).

branchNamespace.description: refs/heads/ root this gaggle's run branches live under (providers.BranchName). Empty defaults to 'goobers/'. A trailing slash is optional. Must be a valid ref-path segment sequence (#965/#1010).

sandbox.description: Per-gaggle override of the instance-wide isolation posture for agentic stages (#1305). Omitted inherits the instance posture; the default is disabled (opt-in).

metadata.description: Deliberately left open (no additionalProperties:false) unlike the rest of this schema: k8s-style metadata objects tolerate forward-compatible extra fields (e.g. a future resourceVersion) by convention (#125).

checkout.description: Partial-checkout declaration (B2, #649). Accepted but not honored by the local runner yet — inert, surfaced as a VER003 compatibility warning at validate time.

sparse.description: Repo-relative path cones a sparse checkout materializes. Empty means a full checkout.

runnerCapability.description: A free-form, version-parameterized runner capability token (e.g. dotnet@8, xcode, os=windows) — distinct from a credential capability. An alphanumeric start then letters, digits, and any of . _ - + @ =, no whitespace.
